task_completion.description: The agent opened the 'ExamAnxiety.csv' dataset in JASP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP application window is open, displaying a data grid with columns including 'Exam', 'Anxiety', and 'Revise'.

task_completion.description: The agent selected the Bayesian Correlation Matrix analysis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left-hand analysis settings panel in JASP displays 'Bayesian Correlation Matrix' at the top.

task_completion.description: The agent added 'Exam', 'Anxiety', and 'Revise' to the analysis variables list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The variables 'Exam', 'Anxiety', and 'Revise' are visible inside the active 'Variables' selection box in the analysis settings panel.

task_completion.description: The agent enabled the Credible Intervals option.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox for 'Credible intervals' (or similar phrasing under the Bayesian Correlation Matrix options) is checked in the left panel.

task_completion.description: The agent enabled the Pairwise Scatter Plots option.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox for 'Scatter plots' or 'Pairwise scatter plots' is checked in the left panel, and scatter plots are visible in the results panel on the right.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the analysis to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'BayesianCorrelationExam.jasp' in the '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/' directory, or the JASP window title bar reflects the new filename 'BayesianCorrelationExam'.

integrity.description: The agent used the JASP graphical user interface to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the JASP application windows, menus, and dialogs, rather than terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: The results in the output panel are genuinely generated by JASP.
integrity.visual_evidence: The right-hand results panel in JASP shows formatted tables and plots characteristic of JASP's output engine, not manually typed text or pasted images.

integrity.description: The agent used JASP's save functionality rather than a terminal command to create a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The JASP 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog is visible, or the JASP application title bar updates to the new filename, proving the application itself saved the file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset is located at '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv'. The analysis must be a 'Bayesian Correlation Matrix'. The variables to include are 'Exam', 'Anxiety', and 'Revise'. The options 'Credible intervals' and 'Scatter plots' (or 'Pairwise scatter plots') must be enabled. The final file must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/BayesianCorrelationExam.jasp'.
